ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., ABC, RF, SGD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the algorithm */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encoders" (
  "encoder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encoder */,
  "encoder_name" TEXT /* Name of the encoder (e.g., CatBoostEncoder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the encoder */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the encoder */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the encoder was added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the encoder was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encoder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resampling_methods" (
  "resampling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resampling method */,
  "resampling_name" TEXT /* Name of the resampling method (e.g., SMOTENC, SMOTE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resampling method */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the resampling method */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the resampling method was added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the resampling method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resampling_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "target_variable" TEXT /* Name of the target variable in the dataset */,
  "number_of_features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  "number_of_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used */,
  "encoder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoder used */,
  "resampling_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resampling method used */,
  "rank_original" REAL /* Rank of the original dataset */,
  "rank_smotenc" REAL /* Rank of the dataset after SMOTENC resampling */,
  "rank_smote" REAL /* Rank of the dataset after SMOTE resampling */,
  "rank_smote_svm" REAL /* Rank of the dataset after SMOTE-SVM resampling */,
  "rank_borderline1" REAL /* Rank of the dataset after Borderline1 resampling */,
  "rank_borderline2" REAL /* Rank of the dataset after Borderline2 resampling */,
  "rank_geometric_smote" REAL /* Rank of the dataset after Geometric SMOTE resampling */,
  "rank_dto" REAL /* Rank of the dataset after DTO resampling */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., REC) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the performance metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_encoder_id FOREIGN KEY ("encoder_id") REFERENCES encoders ("encoder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_resampling_id FOREIGN KEY ("resampling_id") REFERENCES resampling_methods ("resampling_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_datasets" (
  "user_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-dataset association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was accessed by the user */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the dataset has been accessed by the user */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date of the last access to the dataset by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_metrics" (
  "user_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-metric association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was accessed by the user */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the metric has been accessed by the user */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date of the last access to the metric by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the run */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the run */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the run */,
  "encoder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoder used in the run */,
  "resampling_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resampling method used in the run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the evaluation run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the evaluation run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation run (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the run */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation run was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation run was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_runs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_runs_resampling_id FOREIGN KEY ("resampling_id") REFERENCES resampling_methods ("resampling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_runs_encoder_id FOREIGN KEY ("encoder_id") REFERENCES encoders ("encoder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_runs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation run */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation result was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES evaluation_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the model */,
  "encoder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoder used in the model */,
  "resampling_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resampling method used in the model */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the model file */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the model version */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_resampling_id FOREIGN KEY ("resampling_id") REFERENCES resampling_methods ("resampling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_encoder_id FOREIGN KEY ("encoder_id") REFERENCES encoders ("encoder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)
